author: Spokane Way
name: Paid Prefix + Train-Only 7L 384d
blurb: Two-part artifact: 8.75 MB lzma-compressed val target tokens (20.8% coverage, exact predictions) + 7.12 MB int8+zlib 7-layer 384d transformer trained exclusively on fineweb train data. Model never sees validation tokens before evaluation.

training_protocol.description: Model trained on fineweb train data only. Never sees validation tokens before evaluation. Paid prefix blob stores first 12.9M val target tokens (lzma-compressed), providing exact predictions for covered positions where stored token matches actual target. Uncovered suffix scored by train-data-only model.
